test.notes: All 40 contract/repo tests passed, 69 browser-use-discovery tests passed

typecheck.notes: All 17 JS files passed syntax check

reviewsSummary.notes: Only 1 of 2 review reports completed (discovery-browser-setup-and-recovery wrote successfully, discovery-helper-consolidation-and-contract-unification did not write output file)

blockingIssues.description: Handoff commitId 'ac86145' does not correspond to feature work - ac86145 is security refactor, actual work is in commit 6a83067
VerificationSteps require manual browser exercises (missing-endpoint, invalid-endpoint, stub-only, grounded web opt-out, wizard-state resume) not performed in handoff
Several VAL assertions (grounded-web opt-out persistence VAL-CROSS-006, wizard state persistence VAL-CROSS-012) appear not addressed by URL helper consolidation
Review report was not written - subagent task completed but output file not created

appliedUpdates.description: Documented COPIES comment pattern requiring manual propagation of shared helpers to 6 wizard script locations
Noted discovery wizard spec at docs/DISCOVERY-SETUP-WIZARD-SPEC.md describes multi-phase wizard build plan not reflected in handoff

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: workers should verify the commit they reference in handoffs matches the actual feature work, not just the most recent commit
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature discovery-browser-setup-and-recovery handoff referenced commit ac86145 which is a different feature (security refactor)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance: when a feature's verificationSteps list specific manual browser exercises, the handoff must document which exercises were performed and the results, not just 'opened browser'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature discovery-browser-setup-and-recovery verificationSteps specify 5 specific manual exercise categories but handoff only shows 'agent-browser open'

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add boundary: discovery wizard implementation should address all VAL assertions listed in the feature's fulfills field and any referenced cross-area assertions (VAL-CROSS-*)
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature discovery-browser-setup-and-recovery lists VAL-CROSS-006, VAL-CROSS-012, VAL-CROSS-014 in fulfills but these appear unaddressed

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Create frontend-refactor-worker skill or clarify that features with that skillName should proceed using base worker patterns when the skill file is missing
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature discovery-browser-setup-and-recovery references skillName 'frontend-refactor-worker' which does not exist at .factory/skills/frontend-refactor-worker/

rejectedObservations.observation: Script loading order dependency could mask inconsistencies if shared helper API evolves - suggested enforcement mechanism
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a design choice documented in the COPIES comment. Not a current problem - rejected as premature optimization
